audience: Creators and founder network interested in business-safe monetization infrastructure, paid vaults, VIP upsells, Telegram automation, and OnlyFans alternative positioning.
qualityStandard: Premium dark-luxury creator monetization campaign, high-contrast Telegram-readable typography, explicit OnlyFans positioning where relevant, no explicit imagery.

layoutQualityGate.canvas: 1080x1350 portrait; optimized for Telegram feed preview and Instagram-style 3:4 posts.
layoutQualityGate.dominantHeroLines: One dominant visual claim, maximum 3 hero lines, each fitted inside the safe column.
layoutQualityGate.copyDensity: No raw output blocks; captions carry detail, images carry one premium claim plus proof modules.
layoutQualityGate.contrast: Dark-luxury background with high-contrast white/gold/cyan/magenta foreground modules.
layoutQualityGate.brandSafety: Business-safe creator monetization language; no explicit imagery and no platform-confusing spam design.
layoutQualityGate.footer: Tracked CreatorVault/VaultX footer must remain inside the safe area and never collide with chip row.
